items.title: NEW WAR IN ITALY
items.content:
FRENCH AND GERMAN FORCES ENTER NORTHWESTERN ITALY

As of TODAY German and French forces have crossed the Italian border into Piedmont, Valle D’Aosta and Ligury. Despite the fact that Italian forces were busy fighting in Slovakia and the initial weak response from the Italians (as well as their allies) they still managed to regain some ground and balance out the situation.

Currently there’s not much to say about it since the war pretty much just started however more news will come as the situation develops further.

Massive thanks to our allies tho who are currently helping us fight the Fr*nch!
items.author: 698cbe8b186391cbb601ac06

items.title: Un poema entre guerras
items.content:
Con motivo de introducir el arte entre guerras, dejo un poema que muchos conocerán, y a otros tantos les sorprenderá:

Hombres necios que acusáis
a la mujer sin razón,
sin ver que sois la ocasión
de lo mismo que culpáis:

si con ansia sin igual
solicitáis su desdén,
¿por qué queréis que obren bien
si las incitáis al mal?

Combatís su resistencia
y luego, con gravedad,
decís que fue liviandad
lo que hizo la diligencia.

Dan vuestras amantes penas
a sus libertades alas,
y después de hacerlas malas
las queréis hallar muy buenas.

¿Cuál mayor culpa ha tenido
en una pasión errada:
la que cae de rogada,
o el que ruega de caído?

¿O cuál es más de culpar,
aunque cualquiera mal haga:
la que peca por la paga,
o el que paga por pecar?

Pues, ¿para qué os espantáis
de la culpa que tenéis?
Queredlas cual las hacéis
o hacedlas cual las buscáis.

Sor Juana Inés de la Cruz (1651-1695).
items.author: 69af751de5230b35c2242f39

items.title: 🇧🇷📰JORNAL MUNDIAL WARERA📰🇧🇷
items.content:
📰JORNAL MUNDIAL📰

Edição da Manhã

11/03/2026

10:00AM

Saudações, navegadores dos mares de WarEra.

Aqui vai um resumo do que anda acontecendo pelo mundo hoje pela manhã

🌍 EUROPA EM CHAMAS

Uma nova tensão surge no continente europeu.

Um artigo do jogador Piraterer acusa Alemanha de mudar drasticamente sua posição política ao se alinhar com França contra Itália.

Segundo o texto, a Itália estaria mantendo uma postura relativamente pacífica no conflito, enquanto França lidera uma coalizão que agora conta com apoio alemão.

O autor levanta uma crítica:

Não muito tempo atrás França e Alemanha estavam em lados opostos de UMA GUERRA

Agora a Alemanha marcha ao lado do antigo inimigo.

Isso levanta suspeitas entre jogadores europeus sobre oportunismo político e alianças frágeis.

⚔️ GUERRA E PROPAGANDA

Enquanto isso, o jogador Strudelmord publicou um artigo em alemão declarando uma grande ofensiva militar.

Segundo o texto:

Uma operação chamada Operation Morgenröte foi iniciada.

Tropas alemãs avançaram em direção a Liechtenstein.

O texto descreve a ação como uma “libertação”, não uma invasão.

O artigo também fala que França e Alemanha estão alinhadas militarmente, formando uma frente contra inimigos no sul da Europa, especialmente contra forças italianas.

Ou seja:

⚔️ Europa pode estar entrando se fragmentando

☠️ TRAIÇÕES E CONFLITOS INTERNOS

Outro conflito importante acontece na Bósnia.

O ministro representado pelo jogador BlueSilver001 publicou um comunicado oficial acusando um jogador chamado Cira de traição.

Segundo o governo da Bósnia:

Cira teria convencido metade dos cidadãos a se voltarem contra o próprio país

Esses jogadores estariam lutando ao lado de Croácia e Turquia

O governo chama isso de alta traição

A situação interna da Bósnia parece extremamente instável.

🌏 ECONOMIA E DIPLOMACIA

Na Oceania, um jogador chamado HiThere1, da Austrália, publicou um artigo criticando a própria política econômica do país.

Ele falaa que:

O imposto de 20% sobre ferro está prejudicando o país

Isso está criando inimigos e afastando possíveis aliados

Segundo elesem alianças fortes, a economia e a segurança do país podem colapsar

💰 CRISE ENTRE EMPRESÁRIOS

Enquanto governos brigam, alguns empresários estão sofrendo.

O jogador scottmaybe publicou um relato dizendo que:

Investiu toda sua produção em empresas

A guerra começou de repente

Ele ficou sem recursos para produzir munição ou comida

Agora ele pede ajuda de outros jogadores para conseguir continuar lutando.

Em tom irônico ele escreveu

“Alguém poderia ajudar um pobre capitalista perseguido?”

Lembrando a todos que este jornal é apenas um teste. Caso eu receba feedbacks positivos, vou focar em aprimorar e trazer mais notícias.

Não quis investir muito tempo em algo que ainda está em “beta”.

Mas obrigado a todos pelo apoio.

Não esqueçam de se inscrever e comentar sua crítica!

items.title: Join my secret agency
items.content:
Gestapo

I’m making a group in War Era called Gestapo. It’s a secret agency that focuses on spying and organizing coups in the game. Anyone from any country can join, and it doesn’t matter where you’re from as long as you’re willing to help with operations.

The group’s purpose is to gather information on other nations and organize coups to change governments in the game. We also help nations that have puppet presidents and support them in taking back control. Our goal is to work behind the scenes and influence events through intelligence and covert actions.

If you’re interested in joining or want to take part in operations, add me on Discord: gamedev2319 (I’m not a game dev).

items.title: The Truth Behind Recent Bosnia “Defense Ministry” Articles
items.content:
In the past few hours several articles have appeared claiming to represent the Ministry of Defense of Bosnia and Herzegovina. These articles speak about foreign plots, infiltration, and supposed threats against Bosnia within WarEra.

The reality is that the current government presenting itself as the “official leadership of Bosnia” was not formed through a natural political process inside the Bosnian player community. Instead, it emerged after a coordinated effort to influence elections by bringing in a large number of external players shortly before voting periods by Serbia.

These newly arrived accounts were then used to secure political control through simple majority voting.

This practice, often referred to by players as “vote importing”, allowed a small organized group to gain control over key government positions despite not representing the actual Bosnian player base.

At the same time, many long-time Bosnian players who attempted to return to the country have reported facing obstacles when trying to regain their citizenship or political participation. In several cases, requests were ignored or delayed while newly imported voters were allowed to participate freely in elections.

Because of this situation, the current government’s claims about defending Bosnia from “foreign influence” appear deeply ironic to many members of the Bosnia community since the claim comes from players who are proxies of Serbia.

The articles currently circulating attempt to create the impression of external enemies and security threats. Yet they avoid addressing the central issue: how the current leadership actually came to power.

The answer is thru Serbia, since they are representing their government!

Instead of focusing on rebuilding the Bosnian community, recruiting genuine players, and strengthening the country’s economy and military in the game, the current leadership appears more focused on controlling the narrative through dramatic reports and accusations.

This approach risks misleading newer players who may not be aware of the recent political developments inside Bosnia.

Bosnia’s strength in WarEra has always come from its community of active and dedicated players. Restoring trust within that community will require transparency, fair political participation, and an end to manipulative election practices.

Players deserve honest information — not political theatre disguised as official government communication.

items.title: Frases Del Día
items.content:
El que se conquista a sí mismo es el guerrero más poderoso.

No trates de convertirte en un hombre de éxito, sino más bien en un hombre de valor

Un hombre con coraje hace una mayoría

Uno de los secretos del éxito en la vida es estar preparados para cuando se presenta la oportunidad

El hombre que comete un error y no lo corrige, está cometiendo otro error

El hombre exitoso sacará provecho de sus errores y volverá a intentarlo de otro modo

Un hombre de éxito es aquel capaz de construir unos cimientos firmes con los ladrillos que otros le han arrojado

Es un hombre sabio aquel que no se entristece por las cosas que no tiene, sino que se regocija por las que tiene

11/03/2026
items.author: 699b5f2b2e56b2efa3262d9e

items.title: <Ministry of Economy> Emergency update: Bosnia
items.content:
Government Budget and Financial Stability Under Threat Amid Croatian Aggression


The Ministry of Economy of of Bosnia and Herzegovina has issued an emergency statement today, warning that the ongoing Croatian military aggression against the sovereign territory of Bosnia and Herzegovina poses a direct and serious threat to the stability of the national budget and the broader financial framework of the newly independent state.


The unprovoked aggression has disrupted critical economic infrastructure, strained public expenditures, and created significant uncertainty within financial markets at a time when the Republic is working diligently to consolidate its institutions and establish a sustainable economic foundation.


Despite these grave circumstances, the Ministry of Economy wishes to assure all citizens and international partners that the government’s financial policy will remain unchanged. The administration is fully committed to the responsible allocation of available funds, ensuring that every resource at the Republic’s disposal is utilized in the most effective and transparent manner possible to defend and preserve the independence that the people of Bosnia and Herzegovina have rightfully and lawfully won.
The Ministry further confirms that essential public services, state functions, and the protection of citizens will remain prioritized in all budgetary decisions, regardless of the pressures imposed by external aggression.


It is deeply regrettable to note that, in the interest of peace and regional stability, the Government of of Bosnia and Herzegovina formally submitted a peace proposal to the Croatian side. Regrettably, the Croatian side has refused to sign the proposal, leaving the path to a peaceful resolution blocked solely by their unwillingness to engage in good faith dialogue.


The Ministry of Economy calls upon the international community to take note of this refusal and to support Bosnia and Herzegovina in its effort to defend its sovereignty, territorial integrity, and the right of its people to live in peace.
items.author: 697269b90fb0dd96e31bf3ec

items.title: VP SHEKEL ADDRESS TO THE TRUE BLUE
items.content:
VP Shekel has loudly proclaimed to the locals in his pub electorate:

These are dark times, there is no denying.

Our nation has perhaps faced no greater threat than it does today.

But I say this to our Aussie battlers:

We, ever your servants,will continue to defend your smoko, your meat pies, and the right of every hard-working bloke and sheila to knock off on a Friday with a cold beer. We will repel the forces that seek to take it from you!

Your government remains. Strong

Shekel then went on to proclaim:

And another thing, while we’re on the subject, every single koala in this country has chlamydia. The koalas have STDS, and meanwhile people want to ban plastic straws!

He then threatened to punch out a member of the media who copyed his hat.

For anyone who hasnt seen me in the flesh, listen to a minute of this, man announces treason with notes written on his hand then starts talking about wild pigs lol.

Truely a public treasure:
